[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0001001 2
2 0000110 2
3 0000000 a
4 0000000 a
5 0000000 a
6 0010111 4
7 1000010 2

01 10 1010101 4

34 43 0010011 3

56 65 1101010 4
67 76 0001100 2
70 07 0110000 2

72 27 0110111 5

15 51 0000011 2
26 62 0111011 5
37 73 0101010 3
